airplane: an aircraft that travels in the sky
a machine used for air transportation
automobile: a road vehicle with four wheels
bird: an animal with feathers and wings
a creature that can usually fly
cat: a small domesticated animal with fur
a pet that likes to sleep and hunt
deer: a forest animal that runs fast
frog: an animal that jumps and lives near water
horse: a large animal used for riding
ship: a large boat that travels on water
a vessel used for sea transportation
truck: a large vehicle for transporting goods
